gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor moves closer to the screen, gestures with both hands toward the colorful blocks, and smiles invitingly
a person tilts their head slightly, raises one eyebrow, and extends a hand forward as if encouraging guesses about the blocks
a tutor steps to the side, spreads arms wide, and mimics bringing two groups of blocks together in front of them
a person leans forward, using both hands to gesture toward the combined blocks, inviting the audience to count along
a tutor claps their hands together lightly, then counts down with enthusiasm while looking at the learners
a person raises their right hand as they count each number aloud, turning slightly toward the crowd with excitement
a tutor spreads arms wide with a big smile, nodding happily while praising the effort of adding the blocks together
a person steps back, moving hands in a sweeping motion as they emphasize the connection between combining groups and addition
